form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming finished sixth of 11 starters at Carlisle on February 3 over 3400m, 12 len behind Haarar carrying 73.5kg at $9. form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 38 day letup. Last start finished second in a small field at Ayr on March 6 over 4100m, on slow going 9 len behind Walking On A Dream carrying 76kg at $3.80. Run before finished second in a small field at Ayr on February 10 over 4100m, slow track; 8 len behind Ballymackie carrying 76kg at $5.50. Has the ability to be in the finish. Right in the mix if he is at his best.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after 10 months finished sixth of 9 runners at Carlisle on April 4 over 3900m, 12 len behind Belvedere Bhoy with 72kg at $26. Will strip fitter but needs to go up a notch.
